subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Rahim va Sad! May ye be cheered by the sweet-scented breezes of divine bounty, and know ye that the favors of the Lord have ever [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب رحیم و صاد بنفحات عز مرحمت ربانی مسرور بوده بدانند که لم یزل عنایات
